'''Krok''' was a male [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] and the junior husband of the alpha-female of the [[Gakfedd tribe|Gakfedd clan]], [[Bullyak]]. He, along with [[Ugbuz]], Bullyak, and several other Gamorrean warriors were captured the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
